title: Collect and manage data
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect and manage data demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine the type and extent of data to be collected

pcs.text: Define the type and extent of data required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define the type and extent of data required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define the type and extent of data required.

pcs.text: Consider privacy or sensitive data concerns and appropriate methods to address these concerns

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider privacy or sensitive data concerns and appropriate methods to address these concerns.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify data sources.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define data collection methods and techniques relative to data requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate data requirements to staff involved in data collection.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and risks associated with data collecting.
